channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence" - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence"  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Call of Duty advert banned for trivialising sexual violence  BBC
  3. Call of Duty ad banned in the UK for trivializing sexual violence  Game Developer
  4. Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Commercial Featuring Nikki Glazer Receives UK Ban for Trivializing Sexual Violence  IGN
  5. Call Of Duty: Black Ops 7 Ad Banned Over Sexual Assault Joke  Kotaku

item.title: Wedbush’s Dan Ives Sticks to Apple Stock Street-High $350 PT – Calls Selloff ‘Unwarranted’ - TipRanks
item.description:
1. Wedbush’s Dan Ives Sticks to Apple Stock Street-High $350 PT – Calls Selloff ‘Unwarranted’  TipRanks
  2. Apple's AI 'soap opera' is finally ending, analyst says  qz.com
  3. Apple’s Siri saga is at the point of no return  Macworld
  4. Apple’s Latest Attempt to Launch New Siri Runs Into Snags  Bloomberg.com
  5. Apple sell-off 'unwarranted,' as Wedbush says 2026 is the tech giant's year of AI (AAPL:NASDAQ)  Seeking Alpha

item.title: Marathon isn't just favouring PlayStation players with exclusive cosmetics; Xbox and Steam players promised bonus loot, too - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Marathon isn't just favouring PlayStation players with exclusive cosmetics; Xbox and Steam players promised bonus loot, too  Eurogamer
  2. Marathon Open Beta: How To Get In, What To Expect, And PS Plus Bonuses  GameSpot
  3. Marathon’s Server Slam Begins February 26  Bungie.net
  4. Does Marathon Have Crossplay? Cross-Platform Status, Explained  Insider Gaming
  5. Marathon Highlights Rook Gameplay, Creepy Crawlies, and Stylish Kills in New Trailers  GamingBolt

item.title: ASUS confirms Germany store suspension amid Nokia HEVC patent dispute, support remains unchanged - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. ASUS confirms Germany store suspension amid Nokia HEVC patent dispute, support remains unchanged  VideoCardz.com
  2. Acer and Asus halt PC and laptop sales in Germany amid H.264 codec patent dispute — Nokia wins patent ruling, forcing tech giants to license HEVC codec  Tom's Hardware
  3. Public statement to patent dispute with Nokia  ASUS Pressroom
  4. Acer and ASUS are now banned from selling PCs and laptops in Germany following Nokia HEVC video codec patent ruling  VideoCardz.com
  5. German Court Imposes Sales Ban??  indiaherald.com

item.title: Google shares how Android 17 is making everything run smoother - Android Authority
item.description:
1. Google shares how Android 17 is making everything run smoother  Android Authority
  2. Android 17 Beta 1 arrives for Pixel: How to download it  Mashable
  3. Google sets accelerated Android 17 release schedule  9to5Google
  4. Android 17 fixes one of our biggest frustrations, paving the way for Android laptops  Android Police
  5. Don't be surprised if One UI 9 feels smoother to use  SamMobile

item.title: Dead or Alive 6: Last Round will not include Mai Shiranui and Kula Diamond nor crossplay or upgrades for existing owners - EventHubs
item.description:
1. Dead or Alive 6: Last Round will not include Mai Shiranui and Kula Diamond nor crossplay or upgrades for existing owners  EventHubs
  2. Dead or Alive 6 Last Round launches on PS5 June 25, new game also in development  PlayStation.Blog
  3. A new Dead or Alive game is now in development  gamingnexus.com
  4. KOEI TECMO and Team NINJA Announce DEAD OR ALIVE 6 Last Round, Available June 25, 2026!  Games Press
  5. Dead or Alive made the most improbable comeback  Esports Insider

item.title: Fujifilm Has Officially Released a Public Web Simulator for the GFX ETERNA 55 - Y.M.Cinema Magazine
item.description:
1. Fujifilm Has Officially Released a Public Web Simulator for the GFX ETERNA 55  Y.M.Cinema Magazine

  3. FUJIFILM GFX ETERNA 55–AIBOU: Tokyo Detective Duo -Season 24  Newsshooter
  4. Familiarize Yourself With the FUJIFILM GFX ETERNA 55 With This Helpful Web Simulator  No Film School
  5. Fujifilm GFX Eterna 55 Receives Imax Certification  The American Society of Cinematographers
